en_title: 'Similar Art Styles Make the Comparisons Inevitable' — Palworld and Pokémon Fans Are Arguing Over Whether New Whale Pal Panthalus Copies Kyogre
cn_title: 《幻兽帕鲁》新鲸鱼帕鲁再引《宝可梦》抄袭争议
subtitle: 设计边界之争
opus_summary: 《幻兽帕鲁》新生物Panthalus因外形酷似盖欧卡，再次引发设计抄袭争论。多只旧帕鲁也在1.0更新中悄然改版，Pocketpair尚未回应。

paragraphs.en: Palworld and Pokémon fans are arguing over whether a new whale Pal called Panthalus copies the Pokémon, Kyogre.
paragraphs.cn: 《幻兽帕鲁》和《宝可梦》粉丝正在争论：名为Panthalus的新鲸鱼帕鲁是否抄袭宝可梦盖欧卡。

paragraphs.en: Palworld creature Panthalus is a massive legendary blue-green whale with a white belly, flared fins and tribal-like markings across its body, plus a large bronze decoration. Beloved Pokémon Kyogre, meanwhile, is a legendary blue whale with a white belly, flared fins and tribal markings across its body, with no bronze decoration.
paragraphs.cn: Panthalus是体型庞大的蓝绿色传说鲸鱼，拥有白色腹部、展开的鳍、部族风格纹样和大型青铜装饰。盖欧卡同样是带白色腹部、展开鳍和部族纹样的传说蓝鲸，只是没有青铜装饰。

paragraphs.en: Writing on social media, some fans have said that the design of Panthalus is "clearly inspired" by Kyogre, even if the concept of a mythical whale is not unique to Pokémon. One fan dubbed the design as "brazen," though others said it looked "legally distinct" enough.
paragraphs.cn: 一些粉丝称Panthalus的设计「显然受盖欧卡启发」，尽管神话鲸鱼并非《宝可梦》独有。一人称设计「明目张胆」，另一些人则认为两者在法律上「足够不同」。

paragraphs.en: "I feel like the similar art styles make the comparisons inevitable," tweeted video game content creator Josh Scorcher. "Like, Game Freak doesn't own the concept of a legendary/divine whale creature... But you have to be incredibly dishonest to not immediately think of Kyogre when you see this."
paragraphs.cn: 游戏内容创作者Josh Scorcher写道：「相似的美术风格让比较不可避免。Game Freak并不拥有传说或神圣鲸鱼生物这一概念……但看到它却没有立刻想到盖欧卡，那就太不诚实了。」

paragraphs.en: Others, however, have dismissed the comparison. "Literally the only thing they have in common is that they're both whales," one fan said . "Panthalus looks NOTHING like Kyorge," another added . "Concept is there, but I can easily visually distinguish them."
paragraphs.cn: 也有人否定比较。一名粉丝说：「它们唯一的共同点就是都是鲸鱼。」另一人补充：「Panthalus一点也不像盖欧卡。概念相似，但视觉上很容易区分。」

paragraphs.en: oh my god the people saying panthalus doesnt even RESEMBLE kyogre are coping so unbelievably hard bro pic.twitter.com/1Ph4IJR39Q
paragraphs.cn: 我的天，那些说Panthalus甚至不像盖欧卡的人，未免自我安慰得太拼命了。

paragraphs.en: This pal is clearly inspired by Kyogre which isn't inherently a bad thing. However because palworld creatures are mostly inspired by pokemon it makes their designs feel pretty uninspired. Palworld's designs would greatly benefit from taking more inspiration outside of pokemon https://t.co/FvnG2JLucX pic.twitter.com/dA5Jv0waP9
paragraphs.cn: 这只帕鲁显然受盖欧卡启发，本身并非坏事。但《幻兽帕鲁》的生物大多从宝可梦汲取灵感，令设计显得缺乏创意。若从《宝可梦》之外获取更多灵感，设计会好得多。

paragraphs.en: Panthalus 🐳, ein Pal aus Palworld von Pocketpair Inc. & Kyogre 🐋, ein Pokemon von Gamefreak / Nintendo #pokemon #palworld pic.twitter.com/2XQhZXWNvv
paragraphs.cn: Panthalus，一只来自Pocketpair《幻兽帕鲁》的帕鲁；盖欧卡，一只来自Game Freak和任天堂《宝可梦》的宝可梦。

paragraphs.en: Panthalus' introduction comes just as fans discovered that several other Pal species have quietly had their designs changed in Palworld's big 1.0 update . Despite hundreds of other additions and tweaks being listed in developer Pocketpair's patch notes, there was curiously no mention of alterations to Verdash, Robinquill, Fengallop, and Grintale, which previously displayed more distinct similarities to familiar Pokémon species Cinderace, Decidueye, Cobalion, and Galarian Meowth.
paragraphs.cn: Panthalus登场之际，粉丝刚发现《幻兽帕鲁》1.0更新悄然修改了多只帕鲁的设计。Pocketpair补丁说明列出数百项更新，却未提到疾旋鼬、羽箭射手、云海鹿和趴趴鲶的改动；它们此前与闪焰王牌、狙射树枭、勾帕路翁和伽勒尔喵喵存在更明显的相似之处。

paragraphs.en: IGN contacted Pocketpair for comment about these changes, but received no response.
paragraphs.cn: IGN已联系Pocketpair询问这些改动，但没有收到回应。

paragraphs.en: Comparisons between Palworld's Pal designs and Pokémon are nothing new, of course, and fans have been pointing out similarities between species since before Palworld's original launch, when many accused Pocketpair of "ripping off" Pokémon designs.
paragraphs.cn: 帕鲁设计与宝可梦的比较早已不是新鲜事。甚至在《幻兽帕鲁》最初发售前，粉丝就开始指出不同生物的相似之处，许多人指责Pocketpair「照搬」宝可梦设计。

paragraphs.en: And of course, all of this comes amid the ongoing legal battle between The Pokémon Company and Pocketpair over the use of patents, which seemingly prompted the latter to make gameplay changes in order to nullify its claims. A judgment is expected later this year .
paragraphs.cn: 与此同时，宝可梦公司与Pocketpair仍在围绕专利使用进行诉讼，后者似乎已因此修改玩法，以使对方的主张失去依据。判决预计今年晚些时候作出。

paragraphs.en: Palworld's 1.0 launch landed earlier this month, finally bringing the game out of early access. Pocketpair said at the time that it would not raise the game's price beyond $29.99 as Palworld has "become a success beyond our wildest dreams." That statement likely reflects the fact that more than 40 million players have dipped their paws into Palworld since its early access launch.
paragraphs.cn: 《幻兽帕鲁》1.0版本于本月早些时候推出，正式结束抢先体验。Pocketpair表示不会把售价提高到29.99美元(约合人民币203元)以上，因为游戏「取得了远超我们最疯狂想象的成功」。自抢先体验上线以来，已有超过4000万名玩家进入《幻兽帕鲁》的世界。
